highlights.summary:
The TNEA 2026 counselling application window is expected to launch in the first week of May 2026 for Cape Institute of Technology admission to BE/BTech courses.

A few more updates are given below:

faqs.question: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?
faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
faqs.answer:
Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.
Know more about -
Electrical Engineering Courses

faqs.question: Which is the toughest subject in B.Tech Electrical Engineering course?
faqs.answer: The subject that is tough for you might be very easy to study and grasp for your friend, who finds it interesting. For example, you may find Electromagnetic Wave Theory very tough because of the various technicalities and Engineering theory that it deals with. But, for your friend, it might be fun to learn, as it gives them a channel to learn, explore, and experiment with something new.

faqs.question: Are private sector BTech jobs better-paying than government jobs?
faqs.answer:
Well, yes. The private sector BTech jobs in India offer a higher earning potential than the government sector jobs, including promotions, yearly bonuses, performance rewards, etc., along with a plethora of career options across different sectors. Having said that, there is less scope for job stability in the private sector due to market downturns.
The government sector is known for decent job security and other benefits like health insurance and retirement benefits. Rest, you can sit and decide for yourself whatever suits your interests the best. Best wishes.
Read more: B Tech Jobs for Freshers

placements.overview:
Established in 2001, Cape Institute of Technology is located in Tirunelveli, Tamil Nadu. The institute offers courses like B.E. / B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 14 courses offered by the Institute are available across stream such as Engineering. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

Cape Institute of Technology offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from stream such as Engineering. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech. Cape Institute of Technology fee structure ranges between INR 50,000 to 2,00,000.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Cape Institute of Technology offers a wide range of programmes at both UG and PG levels. With option for Full Time learning, students can choose from stream such as Engineering. At the UG stage, courses available include B.E. / B.Tech. For the PG level, there is a wide range of courses like M.E./M.Tech. Cape Institute of Technology fee structure ranges between INR 50,000 to 2,00,000.

faqs.answer: A:    The fees range for courses offerred by the Cape Institute of Technology is around INR 50000 - INR 200000.

faqs.answer: A:    Cape Institute of Technology is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Cape Institute of Technology are Information Technology, Civil Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Electronics Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Structural Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Online classes are good, and faculty members are good.

review_content.Placements: About 7% of students in information technology got placed. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, TVS etc. About 70% of students got placed in many international companies and some inland companies. Software engineer roles in particular fields like bug repoter, app developer, web designer, content creator, etc., are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have good Wi-Fi facilities and a well-equipped library. The classrooms are spacious. It has a well-equipped hostel with almost every necessary thing. The canteen offers good food. Medical facilities are readily available. We have a large playground, where we play basketball and cricket.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Our batch is 2013-2017, and we had good educational and extracurricular activities.

review_content.Placements: Around 30% of the students of our batch got placements, and 35% of my seniors got placements. Mostly our batch students got an offer from IT-companies. Rarely, a few students got placed in core companies. The lowest salary offered by the companies was Rs. 8,500 per month and the highest offered was Rs. 15,000 per month. Companies like Hinduja Global Solutions, Convalt Energy Limited, HCL Chennai, Wipro Bangalore, Adecco Bangalore, Adecco Chennai, Infosys Chennai, Uniq Technologies, Infochola Solutions Pvt Ltd, etc., visited the campus and offered the roles of trainee engineers, etc. There are no internship activities in the college. There is a placement cell, and it is very useful for developing our language, self-motivation, and improving our attitude towards attending an interview. It used for raising our self-confidence at the beginning, and it's very useful for us.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelors of Engineering (B.E.) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and eco-friendly campus.

review_content.Placements: The placement is arranged from various companies and more students got selected. Placement training will be provided periodically to strengthen the career of students by various experts. Entrepreneurship development programs are also arranged once in a month.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has an excellent infrastructure with a good lab facility. t is an eco-friendly campus surrounding by mountains and windmills. There is a separate building for each department, separate hostels and a canteen facility for boys and girls. College buses are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: The main aspect of our college is that it is very Eco friendly and teaching is excellent and the consequences are that canteen is bad and the main advantage is the whole campus is filled with gardens. The campus is also very Eco friendly in all terms. The campus is the best college life while studying and compared to our college this is different. College life is not enjoyable at all and studying is important part in our college. Campus interviews is another major part in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2011
reviews_list.review_title: Review

review_content.Other: For Mechanical Engineers this is the best college in Kanyakumari surroundings with very knowledgeable faculties. It has very good facilitated Labs, calm environment to study, frequently they will conduct lot of workshops and their workshops are inaugurated by international achieved personalities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Review

admission_process.title: Cape Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Cape Institute of Technology admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in stream includingEngineering.Cape Institute of Technologyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asGATE, CEETA, and TNEA. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 50,000 - 2,00,000for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

description: Cape Institute of Technology cutoff 2025 is available for BE/BTech and other courses. BTech admission at Cape Institute of Technology is based on TNEA counselling. To check out the Cape Institute of Technology TNEA cutoff 2025, students can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the cutoff ranks across different rounds, categories and branches. Further updates are below:

Cape Institute of Technology TNEA cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list for admission to the BTech course and its various branches. The cutoff was announced for the reserved and unreserved categories belonging to the All India quota.
For the General AI category, the overall cutoff ranged from 209001 to 236662. According to the last round, the most competitive specialisation was , with a cutoff of .

Students can view the Cape Institute of Technology BTech cutoff for 2025, as well as the cutoff details for 2024 and 2023 across various rounds, categories, and branches. For the General AI category, the most competitive branch for admission during the last round at Cape Institute of Technology was B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering, with a cutoff rank of 209001.

Getting an idea of previous years' cutoffs helps students better understand the cutoff trends and prepare for the upcoming exams accordingly. To assist in the same, below is a table provided where students can view or download the consolidated round and year-wise TNEA cutoff PDFs. reviews.review_heading: Review of Cape Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text:
Our college is neat and clean, and it is constructed in an eco-friendly manner.
Our college is situated in a very rural area where 3/4 of the campus is surrounded by forest.
Students in hostels get extra benefits; they get high-speed and free Internet.

reviews.review_heading: It gives great experience for learning.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure in our college was good. It had well-equipped labs with power backup and air conditioners. The library was well-placed and was easy for students to look for reference books. The boys' hostel was inside the campus and the girls' hostel was located in the city.

reviews.review_heading: It is the worst college in Kanyakumari.
reviews.review_text: The building is good. There is no Wi-Fi. Labs have no AC. Some classrooms have projectors, but the faculty have no knowledge about smart classes. The library has many books, but nobody touches the books. Only the students who are certificated in sports can take part in sports here. The road is very poor, and it takes 15-20 minutes to reach the main road, and 15 minutes from there to reach a hospital.

faqs.question: How is the placement facility at Shanti Suri College of Engineering?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Shanti Suri College of Engineering is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Engineering. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.E./M.Tech. The fee structure for the Shanti Suri College of Engineering programmes is around INR 1,61,500 to 2,95,704.

faqs.answer: A:    Shanti Suri College of Engineering provides programmes including B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech in streams such as Engineering, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Mining Engineering, Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Information Technology.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mining Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I don't recommend anyone taking admission here.

review_content.Placements: No placement opportunities are available because college is not good. Last year, 10 to 20% of students were placed in low-profile companies. The highest salary package was 1.4 LPA. Internships are also not available at this college. Students must arrange their own.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi and no quality in the classroom or library either. The hostel is too old and no facilities are available. The mess is also not good, and the food quality is too bad.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are highly qualified, but they don't want to teach anyone, and the management of the college is not good. The course is too good and it makes me employable. The RTU exam is too tough and we hardly pass. The pass percentage of RTU exams in our branch is almost 30%.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: This college has nothing to do with engineering.

review_content.Placements: Campus placements are not good because there are too many breaks for placements here. Last year, only 30% of students were placed, and no one got campus selection this year. The highest salary package was 2 LPA. It is very little for an engineering student.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good and there is no Wi-Fi available. There are no better labs. The quality of the classrooms and library is not good. The mess and the food quality are not good.
review_content.Faculty: In this college, teachers are too boring and not interested in students. Students also aren't interested in studying. Teachers have too much knowledge, but they don't want to teach anyone. The course curriculum is relevant. It makes students able to do industrial work.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: The college is very good in engineering and also diploma faculty is friendly and highly qualified.

review_summary.college_name: Shanti Suri College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: It was a good college from 2008 to 2018, but it does not have value for money or a career.

content.Placements: Nowadays, this college is not good enough for both placements and studies. I would not recommend you to take admission to this college because placement chances are very low.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi, rooms are averages but hostel food is very bad we cant leave with that food so we go outside to eat food 3-4 times in week and breakfast is quite ohk and there is no canteen no medical facilities no sports and games for seniors so please not take admission in this college.
content.Faculty: Some teachers are good. Some teachers don't even take classes. We can pass the exams, but we have to study on our own. Semester exams are easy to pass. There are no regular classes for senior students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I don't recommend this college.

content.Placements: There were no placements in our college or in our branch. The highest salary package was 1 LPA, and this is disappointing for engineers. Recruiting companies like Jack Wire PVT LTD visited our college, but not many companies visited. Our college is the worst.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is too old, and there is no single playground or lab either. There is Wi-Fi available, but it's only for office work. They don't share the password for Wi-Fi with students. Hostel facilities are too disappointing. We don't have any medical facilities available, but there are many medical colleges nearby.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mining Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I don't recommend anyone taking admission here.

content.Placements: No placement opportunities are available because college is not good. Last year, 10 to 20% of students were placed in low-profile companies. The highest salary package was 1.4 LPA. Internships are also not available at this college. Students must arrange their own.
content.Infrastructure: There is no Wi-Fi and no quality in the classroom or library either. The hostel is too old and no facilities are available. The mess is also not good, and the food quality is too bad.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are highly qualified, but they don't want to teach anyone, and the management of the college is not good. The course is too good and it makes me employable. The RTU exam is too tough and we hardly pass. The pass percentage of RTU exams in our branch is almost 30%.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This college has nothing to do with engineering.

content.Placements: Campus placements are not good because there are too many breaks for placements here. Last year, only 30% of students were placed, and no one got campus selection this year. The highest salary package was 2 LPA. It is very little for an engineering student.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not good and there is no Wi-Fi available. There are no better labs. The quality of the classrooms and library is not good. The mess and the food quality are not good.
content.Faculty: In this college, teachers are too boring and not interested in students. Students also aren't interested in studying. Teachers have too much knowledge, but they don't want to teach anyone. The course curriculum is relevant. It makes students able to do industrial work.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The college is very good in engineering and also diploma faculty is friendly and highly qualified.

content.Placements: Around 20% of students are placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is approximately 5 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. The top recruiting companies are Tata, Ashok Leyland, Hindustan, and Benz. Approximately 80-85% of students are doing internships in our course. In the mechanical field, we have too many opportunities and a good position in any company but one thing affects that skill which is given by college.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and labs are good but classrooms and the library are average in our college. Food quality is poor and hostel facility is average. The canteen isn't available. Sports and games are neglected. There is a short space and so, there is no water park and no highly recommend sport ground. But medical facilities are good because too many medical colleges are around here.

faqs.answer: A:    The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: It is an average college.

review_content.Placements: Only 4% of students got placed with a minimum salary package that ranges between 1.5-3.6 LPA. Top recruiting companies visited our campus for placements was Tech Mahindra. Top roles, like software testing, is offered to students in our batch. About 7% of students did an internship in Chandigarh based companies. Otherwise, many of them joined the company by themselves.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility was average. The hostel was also average. Canteen mess was good at that time. Sports and games were conducted regularly. College was good at our time. But after 2-3 year crowd is gradually decreasing day by day. Medical facilities are good. The multispeciality hospital is in the district 20 km away from the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: The college provides good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: There is no special placement cell on the campus. There were no placement opportunities provided for our senior batch students due to the bad results of the university. Almost 80% of the students did not complete their degree in the proposed four years. I didn't see any student getting any internship from the college. Therefore, there is no point of stipend offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. All the required facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, medical facilities, sports and games, etc., are provided. The labs are fully equipped. There are no faculty members who can teach about the equipment because of their less knowledge. Therefore, there is no need to use labs. Classrooms are well-maintained, and the quality of food offered in the canteen is very good. Hostel rooms are very well-maintained. I am not facing any issues regarding the infrastructure of the college.

overview_faqs.question: What is the average BTech Computer Science Engineering salary in India?
overview_faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

overview_faqs.question: Can Ganpati Institute of Technology andf Management (GITM Yamunanagar) be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Ganpati Institute of Technology andf Management (GITM Yamunanagar) is a well-known institution for M.E./M.Tech, B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Ganpati Institute of Technology andf Management (GITM Yamunanagar) has a rating of 2.61 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 2.49 on Campus Life, 1.93 on Placements, 2.72 on Faculty and 3.28 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Ganpati Institute of Technology andf Management (GITM Yamunanagar) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: If you want to live a proper College Life then don't take admission in this college.

content.Placements: Only 10 percent of students were placed. The highest packgae was 5 lacs, the lowest 3 lacs, average 3.5 lacs were offered during placement. Companies recruited the students were, Microturner, Daffodil, concentrix etc. Max students were offered Senior analyst post as job role.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is fine having IT labs, chemical labs, Wi-Fi, library. Classrooms are not so well maintained but okay. The mess has average food, No medical facilities available, and having field for sports and games but no activities like that.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I'm not totally dissatisfied with our college as it provided me education. But it was not much good.

content.Placements: Less than 10% of the students were placed in low-level companies from here. Very rarely high-level companies visit our college. Students didn't get internships from our batch. The highest salary package offered was 3 LPA. Very less students were placed from here.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not much good here. There were enough classrooms, but there were no good sports and games facilities and medical facilities. Even the food served in the mess was average in taste. There is a basketball court and playground, but sports activities are not conducted. Wi-Fi is available with a good range.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: It is an average college.

content.Placements: Only 4% of students got placed with a minimum salary package that ranges between 1.5-3.6 LPA. Top recruiting companies visited our campus for placements was Tech Mahindra. Top roles, like software testing, is offered to students in our batch. About 7% of students did an internship in Chandigarh based companies. Otherwise, many of them joined the company by themselves.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility was average. The hostel was also average. Canteen mess was good at that time. Sports and games were conducted regularly. College was good at our time. But after 2-3 year crowd is gradually decreasing day by day. Medical facilities are good. The multispeciality hospital is in the district 20 km away from the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college provides good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: There is no special placement cell on the campus. There were no placement opportunities provided for our senior batch students due to the bad results of the university. Almost 80% of the students did not complete their degree in the proposed four years. I didn't see any student getting any internship from the college. Therefore, there is no point of stipend offered.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is excellent. All the required facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, medical facilities, sports and games, etc., are provided. The labs are fully equipped. There are no faculty members who can teach about the equipment because of their less knowledge. Therefore, there is no need to use labs. Classrooms are well-maintained, and the quality of food offered in the canteen is very good. Hostel rooms are very well-maintained. I am not facing any issues regarding the infrastructure of the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: This college is like a temple and enlightens your knowledge.

content.Placements: Placements in the college are good, and the college invites core branch companies for placements. Students with skills, talents and ample knowledge can lead the market with the companies which the college invites for providing jobs. Students will always get a job if they are honest with themselves.
content.Infrastructure: The college is spread over 45 acres of land, providing students with proper lecture rooms, canteen, and separate hostels for boys and girls with proper security. There are 2 grounds for sports, and hostels are provided with all the basic facilities. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: DSIT - Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan Institute of Technology offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and Architecture & Planning. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and B.Arch. Whereas, at PG level, DSIT - Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan Institute of Technology offers courses such as MBA/PGDM. DSIT - Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan Institute of Technology fee structure for all the courses is around INR 35,000 to 2,00,000.

reviews_list.review_title: Complete good college.

review_content.Placements: Every year, campus recruitment is held, and many companies, such as Tata and HCl, recruit talented candidates, such as 20% of the students in my course got the placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a poorly organised lab for my course, with basic civil engineering apparatus available, but it would be beneficial if there were more instruments to learn on. Hostels are well maintained; there is no shortage of water or electricity; the hostel mess has decent food, and there is a field that motivates sports.
review_content.Faculty: My college faculty members were not well versed in civil engineering; they memorised the syllabus and read it to us. They couldn't make us understand the topic. But my friends who are studying biomedical engineering and other departments have good faculty members, and semester exams are so easy if prepared personally without the help of faculty members.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college for a student's future.

review_content.Placements: Almost 99%of students get placements in the top-most companies all over India. We are proud students of this group. They provide good facilities in our department for placements and career awareness. Our college has topmost recruitment in all over Tamilnadu and ranks on top.
review_content.Infrastructure: The world's topmost facilities are available in our hostels. We have the top most chefs for food and snacks. The infrastructure is very awesome and the best in Tamilnadu. We had the best infrastructure. The food served in the canteen is tasty. We also have sports and yoga.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement companies and well constructed buildings with neat and clean classrooms.

review_content.Placements: 1. 30 to 40% of the students got placed. 2. The lowest package is 1lakh/year and the highest is 5 Lakh/year. 3. Winmach is the main recruiting company. 4. 30 percent of the students got internship in Bangalore. The college provides extra coaching classes to students having arrear and slow learners.
review_content.Infrastructure: 1. Labs, Wi-Fi, neat classrooms and library with many books are available. 2. All sports are available, best food in the hostel and evening snacks are also provided. All the things in hostel are well maintained. All the teaching and non teaching staff are very friendly to the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Biomedical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Dhanalakshmi Srinivasan Institute of Technology.

content.Placements: I got placed in two organisations namely Health Watch Tele Diagnostics and Insurance India. The college doesn't much concentrate on providing placements in MNCs. Only some small scale industries are invited to the campus just to let the people know that placement drives are being organised here. There is no additional training provided for placements. The college just focuses on academics but not on providing knowledge.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is poor. The canteen facility is poor. The food available in the canteen is not of good quality but very expensive. The infrastructure is not much developed. There are many issues here. They treat us like school students. They need to maintain some professionalism. The focus is only on exams but not on extracurricular activities. Students have to wear a formal uniform for 4 days and non-formal uniform for one day in a week.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Complete good college.

content.Placements: Every year, campus recruitment is held, and many companies, such as Tata and HCl, recruit talented candidates, such as 20% of the students in my course got the placement.
content.Infrastructure: There is a poorly organised lab for my course, with basic civil engineering apparatus available, but it would be beneficial if there were more instruments to learn on. Hostels are well maintained; there is no shortage of water or electricity; the hostel mess has decent food, and there is a field that motivates sports.
content.Faculty: My college faculty members were not well versed in civil engineering; they memorised the syllabus and read it to us. They couldn't make us understand the topic. But my friends who are studying biomedical engineering and other departments have good faculty members, and semester exams are so easy if prepared personally without the help of faculty members.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for a student's future.

content.Placements: Almost 99%of students get placements in the top-most companies all over India. We are proud students of this group. They provide good facilities in our department for placements and career awareness. Our college has topmost recruitment in all over Tamilnadu and ranks on top.
content.Infrastructure: The world's topmost facilities are available in our hostels. We have the top most chefs for food and snacks. The infrastructure is very awesome and the best in Tamilnadu. We had the best infrastructure. The food served in the canteen is tasty. We also have sports and yoga.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Good placement companies and well constructed buildings with neat and clean classrooms.

content.Placements: 1. 30 to 40% of the students got placed. 2. The lowest package is 1lakh/year and the highest is 5 Lakh/year. 3. Winmach is the main recruiting company. 4. 30 percent of the students got internship in Bangalore. The college provides extra coaching classes to students having arrear and slow learners.
content.Infrastructure: 1. Labs, Wi-Fi, neat classrooms and library with many books are available. 2. All sports are available, best food in the hostel and evening snacks are also provided. All the things in hostel are well maintained. All the teaching and non teaching staff are very friendly to the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I suggest this college only if you like a good culture.

content.Placements: When I studied, my college was under Anna University. That was Anna University’s last batch, and I studied in that batch. After that, it became a private (independent) university. Because of that, our staff told us that placements did not come for us. If I had to give a review based on the period when I studied, it was the worst experience for my classmates. Later, some companies started placing students. But compared to the expectations they promised, this college was not worth it.
content.Infrastructure: I was not a hostel student, but my classmates told me the environment was pretty good, but the food was average, sometimes the worst. Lab facilities and Wi-Fi were pretty good. The hostel food in my college was very ordinary and often disappointing. The quality and taste of the food were not satisfactory, and there was very little variety in the menu. Many times, the food was not fresh, and the same dishes were repeated frequently, which made hostel life uncomfortable for students. Because of this, many students felt dissatisfied and lost interest in eating regularly.

faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Manda Institute of Technology?

review_content.Placements: The placement for our seniors is done in the college. They work in different cities. The salary offered can be computed as per the talent. The minimum salary can be 5000 & maximum is 25000 per month for freshers. Students work as a software engineer, teacher, assistance professor, etc. 75% of the students got the highest stipend is 10000, the lowest is 3000 & average is 7000.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lots of facilities available like the Wi-Fi on the campus, the classrooms are clean, a very good library. The college provides the medical facilities. Also, a sports day is conducted on every Saturday. Every year, sports week will be organised where the students can take part in different types of games like chess, football, cricket, etc. also provide fresh food to every hostile. I didn't face any infrastructural issue yet.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: Civil engineering shows a good infrastructure in front of my college.

review_content.Placements: I got placed in a construction company, and then I had to switch because of the disturbance in my studies due to my job. But, the college gives full efforts, full support, and the USA Arlington University provides patch up. If anyone is interested in going to outer college then they also get help here. You must improve your interview skills. You must do your 100% college. The placement details are shown on the college website as well. In Rajasthan, our college students got selected in RAS, USA, Saudi Arabia, Gujarat, Delhi, Bombay and other nearby cities. I had an entirely ultimate experience with the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020

review_summary.college_name: Manda Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: A superb college which provides good education to all the students.

content.Placements: The placement for our seniors is done in the college. They work in different cities. The salary offered can be computed as per the talent. The minimum salary can be 5000 & maximum is 25000 per month for freshers. Students work as a software engineer, teacher, assistance professor, etc. 75% of the students got the highest stipend is 10000, the lowest is 3000 & average is 7000.
content.Infrastructure: Lots of facilities available like the Wi-Fi on the campus, the classrooms are clean, a very good library. The college provides the medical facilities. Also, a sports day is conducted on every Saturday. Every year, sports week will be organised where the students can take part in different types of games like chess, football, cricket, etc. also provide fresh food to every hostile. I didn't face any infrastructural issue yet.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: Civil engineering shows a good infrastructure in front of my college.

content.Placements: I got placed in a construction company, and then I had to switch because of the disturbance in my studies due to my job. But, the college gives full efforts, full support, and the USA Arlington University provides patch up. If anyone is interested in going to outer college then they also get help here. You must improve your interview skills. You must do your 100% college. The placement details are shown on the college website as well. In Rajasthan, our college students got selected in RAS, USA, Saudi Arabia, Gujarat, Delhi, Bombay and other nearby cities. I had an entirely ultimate experience with the college.

highlights.summary: Get all the latest information regarding Bon Maharaj Engineering College Courses, Fees, Eligibility, Admission, Rankings and Reviews on this page.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Bon Maharaj Engineering College is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MBA/PGDM. The fee structure for the Bon Maharaj Engineering College programmes is around INR 1,00,800 to 2,44,800.

faqs.answer: A:    Bon Maharaj Engineering College provides programmes including UG Diploma, B.E. / B.Tech, BBA, BCA, MBA/PGDM, After 10th Diploma in streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Sales & Marketing, Electronics & Communication Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: Bon Maharaj: come and shape yourself.

review_content.Placements: There are no proper placements in the college. A very less percentage of the people get placed here and a few companies like the Amazon, a company from Uttarakhand and such visit the campus. The package provided was for around Rs. 1.9 lakhs per annum. The job offer was in a franchise company for achieving the target given.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is a great infrastructure consisting of the library, greenery, and buildings which were properly maintained. Laboratory was good for all classes with fully equipped and with new technologies. The canteen was also on the campus with good and affordable food. My recommendation would be the chilly potato.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: The faculty and facilities are average. The placements are not good.

review_content.Placements: This college does not provide placements to the students. In my secession 2014-17, only one company visited in our college, Amazon.in., and company selected 15 students from BBA and MBA. But no one joined the company because the company offered the salary of 12-18 thousand per month and it was far from the city. The role was to promote the company to the retailers so that they can include these retailers with the company to get the orders and so easily the company can complete their order with the help of these retailers and wholesalers. The internship is also not provided by the college if any student is interested in internship then he/she can do it by themselves. The college is not going to help in the internship. So the students have to bear the cost of the internship by themselves.

hostel.description: The institution has separate in campus hostel for Boys and Girls. Rooms are furnished and air cooled with basic amenities such as water coolers, geysers and RO water purifiers, recreation hall and colored TV. Mess facility is also available at reasonable price. Armed guards are available round the clock.

library.description: The Library houses a huge collection of books on engineering & technology. Comprises audio-visual aids, journals, periodicals, magazines and newspapers for effective learning. reviews.review_heading: If you have passion, then study here because this college provides you with the best education.
reviews.review_text: Bon Maharaj College has a wide area of infrastructure with beautiful gardens all around. There are swimming pool and big auditorium on the campus. The classrooms are air-conditioned and are kept neat and clean. The library is spacious and has better seating arrangements. The college provides hostel facility too.

reviews.review_heading: Bon Maharaj: come and shape yourself.
reviews.review_text: There is a great infrastructure consisting of the library, greenery, and buildings which were properly maintained. Laboratory was good for all classes with fully equipped and with new technologies. The canteen was also on the campus with good and affordable food. My recommendation would be the chilly potato.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty and facilities are average. The placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college to students is good. The required labs are available, and classrooms are fine. Sometimes we were not able to find the books, but most of the times we could find the books in the library. The medical facilities are available only for a headache or minor problems, no other medicines are available in the college. Games are arranged in a fixed time and also held some competition, but this facility is provided only for a short time. They provide an average kind ...

reviews.review_heading: Below average college. Avoid admission.
reviews.review_text: Poor infrastructure. The building from the outer view is quite attractive but labs playgrounds etc are not up to the mark. Especially the labs are not at all up to the mark. Classrooms are not air-conditioned but still, furniture is okay, not so bad. And there is a proper ground and park.

highlights.summary: Here are some additional updates regarding the Shri Dadaji Institute of technology and Science (SDITS):

faqs.answer: A:    Shri Dadaji Institute of technology and Science (SDITS) has courses such as B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, MCA, M.E./M.Tech, GNM which are primarily in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Nursing. Shri Dadaji Institute of technology and Science (SDITS) has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Information Technology, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Industrial Engineering, GNM specializations in General Nursing & Midwifery.
faqs.question: Which courses are offered by Shri Dadaji Institute of technology and Science (SDITS)?

reviews_list.review_title: Good college, you can take admission.

review_content.Placements: Placements were provided after 2014 batch. As we are the very early batch after college has been established. After that students got placement. TPO also changed after that and today's tpo is very career oriented for students.
review_content.Infrastructure: Not very good infrastructure. But can be considered as engineering college. You will get classrooms with 4 fans, good infra. At our time they use blackboard for teaching, now there are smart classes. Very broad and in very vast area developed there are 3 buildings with canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: SDITS College placements are good.

review_content.Placements: My batch students got placed in placement in Dhoot Transmission Limited (Aurangabad, Maharashtra), and my senior batch's placement is Indore. The salary offered per month is Rs. 12,000. After one year, the salary will be increased to 20-30%. Dhoot Transmission Limited (Aurangabad, Maharashtra) manufactures the wires used in cars and bike. This is an open campus drive held in the college. Overall, the placements are good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is available during the college hours. The labs are available in the college. The medical facilities are not good. We are not allowed to play games and sports in free time, but a sports room is available in the college. The canteen is available, but the food is of third quality. The hostel is not available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements in 2016, good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Amazon visits the college to conduct campus drives every year and selects more than 100 students. The minimum percentage required to sit for placements is 60%. The salary offered to the students is Rs. 15,000 per month. Bhilwara Infotechnogies Limited Group, Noida NCR ( New Delhi ) visited the campus for placements, and more than 200 students got selected from all the branches. Many other companies also visited the college last year. The minimum salary offered to the students by Amazon is Rs. 9500 per month.
review_content.Infrastructure: The Wi-Fi facility is available in the college. The classrooms are clean & neat. A large number of books are available in the library; medical facilities are too weak, sports and games are available such as ( carrom, table tennis, chess etc. ). The lab facilities are fair. Good quality of food is available in the canteen. Hostel facilities are not available. Bus facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college is value for money for students who couldn't afford lacs of fees.

content.Placements: Every candidate does not get placed, but our college and TPO do their best so that every deserving candidate gets placements. CS and IT students get placed more as compared to other branches. Many companies visit here like HCL Technologies, Eicher Motors, TCS, Amazon and Minda Industries.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides all the useful facilities like Wi-Fi, library, sports ground, canteen, etc. Labs get restocked every month, and the library has almost every book needed. The college lacks a hostel facility, so students need to take rental near the city.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is an average college.

content.Placements: None of the companies visits our college for placements. It is very bad for all the students. Almost 90% of the students have an unemployment problem after their graduation, which is a huge problem. All students are still struggling for a job, including me. Rest everything is good.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good. Hostel facility is not available. Laboratories are good, but equipment which is used for the practical purpose is not good, and all equipment is giving wrong results. They are not working properly. The seminar hall is very good, and computer laboratories are superb. They are fully air-conditioned.

admission_process.title: Shri Dadaji Institute of technology and Science (SDITS) Admission Process

paragraphs: Shri Dadaji Institute of technology and Science (SDITS) admission is entrance based for courses offered at UG and PG levels. Some of the popular exams accepted by the institution for admission are JEE Main, GATE, and MP BE, etc. The institution offers 12 courses to the students in the stream of Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, and Nursing, among others. At the UG level, some of the popularShri Dadaji Institute of technology and Science (SDITS) coursesinclude B.E. / B.Tech and GNM and at the PG level, the institution offers, MBA/PGDM, MCA, and M.E./M.Tech, among others. Candidates interested in Shri Dadaji Institute of technology and Science (SDITS) admission 2024 can check the fees and other details below:
lists: Shri Dadaji Institute of technology and Science (SDITS) Fees: The total tuition fees for UG courses range between INR 150,000 - INR 200,000 and the total tuition fees for PG courses range between INR 78,000 - INR 124,000. Other than the tuition fees, students might also be required to pay application, exam and other fee components. This fee information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body but is subject to change.

Shri Dadaji Institute of technology and Science (SDITS) Course Duration: The duration for UG courses offered at Shri Dadaji Institute of technology and Science (SDITS) ranges between 3 - 4 years and the same for PG courses is 2 years.

reviews.review_text: Our college provides all the useful facilities like Wi-Fi, library, sports ground, canteen, etc. Labs get restocked every month, and the library has almost every book needed. The college lacks a hostel facility, so students need to take rental near the city.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is an average college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Hostel facility is not available. Laboratories are good, but equipment which is used for the practical purpose is not good, and all equipment is giving wrong results. They are not working properly. The seminar hall is very good, and computer laboratories are superb. They are fully air-conditioned.

reviews.review_heading: Good college, you can take admission.
reviews.review_text: Not very good infrastructure. But can be considered as engineering college. You will get classrooms with 4 fans, good infra. At our time they use blackboard for teaching, now there are smart classes. Very broad and in very vast area developed there are 3 buildings with canteen.

reviews.review_heading: SDITS College placements are good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available during the college hours. The labs are available in the college. The medical facilities are not good. We are not allowed to play games and sports in free time, but a sports room is available in the college. The canteen is available, but the food is of third quality. The hostel is not available.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2016, good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility is available in the college. The classrooms are clean & neat. A large number of books are available in the library; medical facilities are too weak, sports and games are available such as ( carrom, table tennis, chess etc. ). The lab facilities are fair. Good quality of food is available in the canteen. Hostel facilities are not available. Bus facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shri Dadaji Institute of technology and Science (SDITS).
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is good. The cricket ground and sports ground are very clean. The college has a very good library. Classroom infrastructure is average. The environment is clean. The air around the college is very good and good for health. There is one canteen and all the facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The campus of my college is not so luxury. It has decent quality of facilities. You have to manage it by yourself. Sports and games activities happen from time to time. These activities are so interesting and you will surely enjoy them with your friends.

reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with mess food, the atmosphere on the campus and department placements.

review_content.Placements: From our batch and in our class, only 2 students were placed. The highest salary offered is Rs. 2,200 per month. We didn't have any core biotechnology company. Our college doesn't provide any internship, and we have to do it separately from some other place. Particularly I did it from Lucknow CytoGene.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have a good hostel, but the problem was only of mess food. We even had Wi-Fi, and our labs were well-equipped. We have a superb atmosphere in our department. Our HOD was always supportive, and we had many conferences and good faculty members support throughout our academic session.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, faculty members, and very good campus placements every year.

review_content.Placements: The college provides some good opportunities for students to get placements. Some companies visit the college, and we always have a good chance to get placements. The college provides extra classes to make sure that students perform well in interviews. Students' efforts are very important to get placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college has a very good infrastructure. The college is located in a very suitable place. Hostel facilities are very good, and the other facilities like libraries, canteens, hospital, washrooms and labs are also very good. All the departments work properly. I am from the mechanical engineering department. You will get all kind of help in college, and I think it will be good for you to take admission in this college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college in all aspects.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students were placed in our course. Many got the best marks in their way and acquires the best package in their life. The average salary pacakge offered ranges from 3 LPA - 7 LPA. The top recruiting companies were Mahindra, Tata, and BHEL. Around 80% of students got internships. This college helps students in internships in their known industry, and many of them had their own choice, and the role offered was HR.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, laboratories, classrooms, and library were provided. The department was best in all respect, and they were qualified and knowledgeable. Best quality in all respect, the quality of food was good, and the mess was clean and there was good medical facilities 24X7, and all sports were held in our college.

Our HOD was always supportive, and we had many conferences and good faculty members support throughout our academic session.

faqs.answer: A:    Tirumala Engineering College (TRML) is a good institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, After 10th Diploma, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Tirumala Engineering College (TRML) are Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, VLSI Design, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Information Technology.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely not satisfied with the faculty.

review_content.Placements: When I was in college, we only had a pool campus drive, and no one from our college got selected. In a few other drives, few people got selected and didn't receive any offer letter yet. Sometimes, they'll even bring companies for technical support roles, just for namesake.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure looks good, but the maintenance is poor. Most of the books in the library are outdated, and we complained about it many times to get the latest books based on the change of regulations, but they didn't respond. The hostel food is a big punishment for everyone.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: We are satisfied with the faculty and college atmosphere.

review_content.Placements: Almost 15 % of our classmates got placed in campus interviews. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Few of them got placed in ATMES and other startups. We haven't got any internships from our college. Our college teaches well but not in a job-oriented manner.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good when compared to other colleges. We have a Wi-Fi connection, labs, and all the labs are under working conditions with complete infrastructure. The library has a good number of books, and the classrooms are fine. Sports and games are very well conducted but hostel facilities are not up to the mark.

review_summary.college_name: TRML Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I am disappointed with the placements and management.

content.Placements: About 50% of students from our course got placed. I do not suggest students join this college from the placement point of view. The salary package offered in campus placements was 1.8 LPA. Startup companies visit our college for placements. Students do not get an internship. A top role offered is a trainee software developer.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are not bad in our college. Labs and the library are available. It does not provide a Wi-Fi facility. The hostel facility is very bad. The food served is very bad, and management will not take any action on this issue. I do not suggest students join the hostel. There are no medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with this college because of its infrastructure and placements.

content.Placements: There were no placements in this college, and no company approached students. There were no students who got internships. Few got placed outside the campus. Students didn't got any placements offers in our colleges, which was not good, but students had a good experience with this college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was not very good in this college. Laboratories were good, and Wi-Fi facilities in our college was also provided. Hostel facility was good. The food served was also good, and sports were good in this college. Canteen was average.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely not satisfied with the faculty.

content.Placements: When I was in college, we only had a pool campus drive, and no one from our college got selected. In a few other drives, few people got selected and didn't receive any offer letter yet. Sometimes, they'll even bring companies for technical support roles, just for namesake.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure looks good, but the maintenance is poor. Most of the books in the library are outdated, and we complained about it many times to get the latest books based on the change of regulations, but they didn't respond. The hostel food is a big punishment for everyone.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: We are satisfied with the faculty and college atmosphere.

content.Placements: Almost 15 % of our classmates got placed in campus interviews. The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Few of them got placed in ATMES and other startups. We haven't got any internships from our college. Our college teaches well but not in a job-oriented manner.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good when compared to other colleges. We have a Wi-Fi connection, labs, and all the labs are under working conditions with complete infrastructure. The library has a good number of books, and the classrooms are fine. Sports and games are very well conducted but hostel facilities are not up to the mark.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It is good to join this college for good education and placements.

content.Placements: The students with above 70% marks get placed. The highest package offered is 3.6-4 Lacs per annum, and the lowest package is 1.5 Lacs per annum. The top-recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro and Infotech. Students with above 75% are eligible to apply for internships in some software companies.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities are not bad. Wi-Fi signals are not good. The labs are not satisfactory. Classrooms are good and have good seating arrangements. Cleanliness is not maintained. The library and its systems need to be improved.

reviews.review_text: The facilities are not bad. Wi-Fi signals are not good. The labs are not satisfactory. Classrooms are good and have good seating arrangements. Cleanliness is not maintained. The library and its systems need to be improved.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Tirumala Engineering College (TRML).
reviews.review_text: The college does not provide Wi-Fi facility. There are many labs, but no machinery. I don't know about the hostel facility. It does not give time for sports, and it does not conduct competitions. There is no entertainment here. The canteen is good. A mess is not for the daily scholar, so I don't know about the mess.

reviews.review_heading: The review of Tirumala Engineering College (TRML).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is unique. We have spacious classrooms and a big playground. The college is good with modern facilities that are useful for academics. Even the libraries are awesome here. The hostel available here is big and good. Even the food offered in the hostel is good.

reviews.review_heading: An average college with low fee.
reviews.review_text: The library system here provides all the important books. There are spacious separate hostels for male and female candidates at very nominal charges. The mess food is good, and mostly south Indian dishes are provided. A grocery store is also available at the campus for purchasing daily need items. The infrastructure of the college is worthy according to the fees.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Tirumala Engineering College (TRML).
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, and it is regularly maintained. The college conducts sports sessions on Saturday. Labs are okay. The library is very good and contains good books. The food provided in the canteen is average. The college provides hostel facility for boys, and it is okay. The food provided in the hostel is very good.

reviews.review_heading: The review of Tirumala Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: I think we had one of the best infrastructures. Beautiful gardens are available in and outside of the college. My college ground was the best when compared to whole district colleges. We had a lot of fun in our two canteens. One canteen for hostel students and another one is for all. Good tennis courts are available.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of management.
reviews.review_text: We don't have Wi-Fi on this campus. The classrooms are big enough but students are lesser in number than the benches. We don't have any medical support and the physical director of this college is not up to the mark, so it's difficult for the sports people who choose this college, they can't find any growth.

reviews.review_heading: It is the worst college to study.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi facility. The labs are just for words. The library is pretty good. The medical facilities are the worst. There are no games or sports. The food provided is oily. The hostel food is the worst. There is no support from the faculty. There is no proper guidance. It is the worst college for the diploma. There are no proper sections for departments.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the college is good, but disappointed about the knoweldge of the faculty.
reviews.review_text: During my academic year, we don't have the Wi-Fi facilities, but now they are providing fully Wi-Fi facilities for those students, who are studying in Tirumala Engineering College. The labs are highly equipped with well-maintained by our college management. Coming to the classrooms, it's neat and hygienic for neat studying. The classrooms are comfortable for studying. The medical facilities are not present, when I'm studying, but don't know about now. We have the widest place/ground for playing ...

reviews.review_heading: Not completely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities offered by our college such as Wi-Fi facility for students etc. There are highly equipped laboratories and hygienic classrooms. The biggest library, where 300 students can study at a time is available. The latest books regarding daily affairs and technology are present.

reviews.review_heading: Good college because of the faculty and good placements in 2017.
reviews.review_text: About the college facilities, it has good labs, Wi-Fi campus, the huge library and has a digital library, it has the medical facilities and indoor games like table tennis, chess etc. and the outdoor games like volleyball, football, etc. are provided in the campus. The college provides the hostel rooms. I don't face any infrastructure related issues during my tenure at the college.

faqs.answer: Madhira Institute of Technology and Sciences is a renowned institution offering M.Pharma, M.E./M.Tech, After 10th Diploma, B.Pharma, MCA, B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences, Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Madhira Institute of Technology and Sciences boasts an impressive review rating of 3.4 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4 for Campus Life, 4 for Placements, 2.5 for Faculty, and 4 for Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Can Madhira Institute of Technology and Sciences be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Madhira Institute of Technology and Sciences is a renowned institution offering M.Pharma, M.E./M.Tech, After 10th Diploma, B.Pharma, MCA, B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Medicine & Health Sciences, Engineering, IT & Software, Business & Management Studies. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Madhira Institute of Technology and Sciences boasts an impressive review rating of 3.4 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 4 for Campus Life, 4 for Placements, 2.5 for Faculty, and 4 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Madhira Institute of Technology and Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college has good teaching faculty. They make us improve our skills.

content.Placements: Seventy percent of the students were placed in my course in previous years, and we can expect to have more placement opportunities in our final year, with salaries of at least 30 LPA. Some companies, like TCS and Wipro, offered around 9LPA per annum. Currently, I don't know of any available internships. We focused on testing, teamwork, and development in our projects.
content.Infrastructure: There are good classrooms and happy to learn in the library we can gather more information about the subject. The faculty was very friendly with the students. The hostel was average in my way, and the quality of food was good for Andhra Pradesh people. Telangana people don't like the food I think so.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure with decent education.

content.Placements: If you are looking for top placements, you can go with popular B.Tech course that gives you full potential for placements. Maximum percentage of students are placed in top companies. Every student gets internship opportunities in the final year. Top companies are Wipro, etc.
content.Infrastructure: If you want to get knowledge then you can go to library. Wi-Fi is available on campus and hostel is also available. Hostel Wi-Fi is also there. College will have a canteen and medical facilities.
content.Faculty: It is JNTU affiliated college so the question papers are provided by the university. Teachers will guide you through the academic year and students are provided practical knowledge by labs and curriculum activities. The pass percentage can be 35 to 40%. Our faculty members are really strict and at the same time knowledgeable people who will teach you according to your courses.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Extreme satisfaction with our college life of 2022, excellent infrastructure.

content.Placements: Placement assistance is appreciable in our college. At the time of our graduation, we got many companies for interviews, and useful information from our juniors is that the college has now improved in providing more placements from reputed companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our campus and hostel is excellent. Initially, we were worried about all those, but after joining, I have no regrets about joining the institute as they provided us the best in everything, from the hostel to the campus in terms of infrastructure.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied because nature of the college is good .

content.Placements: 1. Passing percentage of the students is 76%. 2. The highest annual package of the course is INR 6 LPA, the lowest is INR 3.5 LPA and the average is INR 3 LPA. 3. Top recruiting companies are TCS, WIPRO, etc. 4. We got 50% of internship in TCS, Wipro, Amazon and Byjus. Top roles offered is of general manager .
content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are very hygienic. Canteen facility is also good and there is a central and digital library, No Wi-Fi facility, Hostel is average. College nature is very good and bus facility is good. Sports ground is also available. The quality of hostel is not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Happy, happier, the happiest days of life.

content.Placements: Batch & Course: Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech) in Computer Science and Engineering Batch: 2018-2024 Placement Statistics: Percent Placed: 92 percent of the students were placed. Highest Package: 10 LPA (offered by TCS). Lowest Package: 4 LPA (offered by mid-size startups). Average Package: 8 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The course offers modern classrooms with Wi-Fi, advanced labs and a vast library. Hostels have clean rooms, Wi-Fi and 24/7 security. The mess and canteen serve hygienic food with a variety. Medical facilities include on-campus doctors. Sports include cricket, basketball and a gym.

paragraphs: Madhira Institute of Technology and Sciences admissions are based on merit. Some of the courses include B.E. / B.Tech, B.Pharma, MBA/PGDM and MCA. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 2,00,000 - 2,88,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years - 3 years.

cut_off.college_name: Madhira Institute of Technology and Sciences Cutoff 2025: Check TS ICET Round Wise Cutoff Ranks

description: Madhira Institute of Technology and Sciences cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Madhira Institute of Technology and Sciences TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 94045 and 102608 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. For other B.E. / B.Tech specialisations

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top two most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 94045 and 102608, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Madhira Institute of Technology and Sciences. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Madhira Institute of Technology and Sciences MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 49349. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 47568, and the 2023 cutoff was 34351 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been decreasing in the last 3 years.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Mahakal Institute of Technology offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.E. / B.Tech, BCA and BBA. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Mahakal Institute of Technology offers M.E./M.Tech. The fees for Mahakal Institute of Technology courses range between INR 42,000 to 1,14,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Mahakal Institute of Technology is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, UG Diploma courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Mahakal Institute of Technology has course specializations in Civil Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Information Technology, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning.
