reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Baat college worth for money.

review_content.Placements: The placed students must have 75% or above in their degree and also in their school results. The lowest package is 1.5 LPA, and the highest package for students in the mechanical branch is approximately 5 LPA. All types of job roles are available for mechanical branch students; most students are comfortable with positions like design engineer, production engineer, quality engineer, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of MIT is far better; classrooms are neat and clean, and the library is much larger. The quality of food available in the mess is great, and while the canteen is small, the food is digestible. In sports, the clubs are supportive.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Everything about MIT, Ujjain.

review_content.Placements: About 67% of students got placed this year with the highest package of 27 lacs per annum and an average package of 7 lacs per annum. Almost each student got an opportunity for an internship in various sectors of their respective fields, which helped them a lot.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is absolutely huge and quite spacious amongst other colleges in RGPV. There are mainly two cafeterias to sit in. Labs and classrooms are quite comfortable, with a spacious cabinet environment supporting the company's structure.

review_summary.college_name: Mahakal Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: East or West, college life is best.

content.Placements: When I took admission, they showed me a list of placed students and told me our college placement percentage is 80%, but after admission, I took advice from my seniors, and they told me only 60-65% of students are placed every year, and this was right because I saw after the year my seniors were right.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is very good, and lots of facilities are provided by the college. The library is very good, and also the college canteen, ground, cricket ground, basketball court, and many more sports facilities are provided by the college, and the sports teacher is very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college which lost its credibility.

content.Placements: 10 to 20% of students were getting placed. 8 LPA is the highest package and the lowest is 1 LPA. TCS, Wipro, etc. are the top recruiters. You have to look out for internships; college will not provide you any internships. Most of the companies come with sales backgrounds, not from your core background.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good but you will get only 35 MB per day from Wi-Fi. The library is good but you will not get books apart from your subjects. The hostel facility is good but the food is not that good. You will not get proper sports equipment. There is also a gym, which is good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Baat college worth for money.

content.Placements: The placed students must have 75% or above in their degree and also in their school results. The lowest package is 1.5 LPA, and the highest package for students in the mechanical branch is approximately 5 LPA. All types of job roles are available for mechanical branch students; most students are comfortable with positions like design engineer, production engineer, quality engineer, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of MIT is far better; classrooms are neat and clean, and the library is much larger. The quality of food available in the mess is great, and while the canteen is small, the food is digestible. In sports, the clubs are supportive.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Everything about MIT, Ujjain.

content.Placements: About 67% of students got placed this year with the highest package of 27 lacs per annum and an average package of 7 lacs per annum. Almost each student got an opportunity for an internship in various sectors of their respective fields, which helped them a lot.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is absolutely huge and quite spacious amongst other colleges in RGPV. There are mainly two cafeterias to sit in. Labs and classrooms are quite comfortable, with a spacious cabinet environment supporting the company's structure.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This is my college review for your information.

content.Placements: College Placement is normal, with not a big number of students placed. The college will claim a 100% placement rate, but it's approximately 50%. Top recurring companies for my course include TCS and many others. We will also have the opportunity to do a private internship.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is excellent. Labs will be available with all the instruments necessary for the course. The library will have all the relevant books. The classrooms and hostel rooms will be of the highest quality.

reviews.review_heading: This is my college review for your information.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is excellent. Labs will be available with all the instruments necessary for the course. The library will have all the relevant books. The classrooms and hostel rooms will be of the highest quality.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities. The library has all course-related books. The hostel facilities are good. There is no mess in our college. Our college does not provide a canteen. Medical facilities are not available in our college. The hostel does not provide some games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent environment for students for studies but lack of practical studies.
reviews.review_text: Well designed with the latest technology systems in labs to access Internet at any time. Also each classes has a PowerPoint presentation system by which students can learn digitally through Internet in classrooms. Quality of hostels and the food of hostel is quite better than outer areas, with better opportunity in sports kotak for students.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placements and minimal fee.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very good and spreads in around 35 acres. All the labs are available in the college. Library and many classrooms are there, All the sports are available and hostel and mess facilities are available. Medical facilities is very poor.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ujjain's best engineering college.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities available on campus are a dream come true. The infrastructure, buliding, labs, classrooms, and hostel are well managed. Hostel has a separate building for boys and girls. All the necessary facilities are available like mess, canteen, medicals, and sports.

reviews.review_heading: Partially satisfied because of good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good. The classrooms are big and have good cross ventilation. A library is available in our college. The campus is very big and has a playground. The hostel and canteen facilities are good, and proper sanitation is available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a Wi-Fi facility. We have all subject-related labs like BEEE, Physics, Chemistry, BME, BCE, computer ED, and so on. The library with almost all the required books and reading space is available in the college building. We have a huge number of classrooms too. Good quality food is served in the mess. We also have a large sports ground and sports equipment is available. The medical facilities are available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure and good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good enough. Wi-Fi facility is available in our college. Classrooms are not so good but the library is good. There are a lot of books available in our college library. Labs are good. Everything is good enough and the hostel quality is also good. The canteen on the campus is better. But the medical facility is low. Sports and games are held in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, better infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: It has a good infrastructure. All the required labs are available. Tier are different labs for different subjects. A well managed library is available which has all the required books that we need during our course. Also Wi-Fi facility is available in campus. Classrooms are good. And some classes are smart classrooms. There is only boys hostel available. Mess food is good. But the canteen food is not much good. Our college has good sports and games. There are clubs for everything like dance club...

reviews.review_heading: Best campus life and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: College is providing library services. Our college library contains a lots of books of various domains. In our college there is lab available for every subject in B.Tech course. Wi-Fi facility is also available in the college. About hostel there is hostel only for boys. The hostel facilities are little week and the mess is the worst. Good facility available for sports.

reviews.review_heading: There is amazing infrastructure, good placements and job opportunities.
reviews.review_text: This college has Wi-Fi and labs with well-equipped computers and lighting. The library is huge and offers all course books. The college has a facility for the hostel which is very good, but the mess and canteen need a bit of improvement regarding the food quality. There are college fest and sports and games also.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with the college. One should take admission in a government college.

review_content.Placements: No single student got placed through college placements, but by off-campus, everyone got placed in reputed companies, like L&T, Punj Lloyd, Unitech, etc. No students got an internship through college, but from their resources, everyone got an internship in companies like L&T, DLF, Punj Lloyd, Soma, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: There was no Wi-Fi facility from 2006-2010, but now I don't know. There are good labs, classrooms and also a library in the college. The college hostel is average as per the price they charge. The breakfast provided in the hostel is good, but dinner used to be pathetic. Sometimes I used to eat chapati with sugar to get sleep. There are no medical facilities in the college. There are good sports and games at the college. There is a vast stadium in the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: I had a very bad experience in the college.

review_content.Placements: There were no placements for my branch. The college doesn't provide placements to the students who don't have proper knowledge about their subjects.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was very bad. Classrooms were in very poor condition and were not maintained properly. Washrooms were not even usable. Wi-Fi facility was available just for namesake. The library was not maintained properly. The canteen was not much good. Drinking water facilities were sometimes not available on the campus, and you have to go to some other place to have water. Overall, the infrastructure of the college was very poor.

overview_faqs.question: Is Ramgarhia Institute of Engineering and Technology a good college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Ramgarhia Institute of Engineering and Technology is a well-known institution for B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech, MCA courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, Ramgarhia Institute of Engineering and Technology has a rating of 2.67 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 2.81 on Campus Life, 1.61 on Placements, 3.32 on Faculty and 2.9 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Ramgarhia Institute of Engineering and Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is an affordable college.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA. The average salary package offered is 3.5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2. The top recruiting company is Sonalika.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The library contains a large stock of books, but books are old, and the majority of topics are available in those books. After the covid, the hostel is still closed.
content.Faculty: Teachers are good and hardworking. The mechanical industry is the base of developing and developed countries. Exams are average, but teachers conduct exams very seriously.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with this college.

content.Placements: Our college has tie-ups with Microsoft, a Canadian university, and companies like Tech Mahindra. Drives are held monthly by various well-known companies, and students take part in them.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are airy. Free Wi-Fi is provided to students. Labs are well managed. There are different smart rooms for personality development classes. There are labs in every block of the college. Hostels have been closed since COVID time and are yet to be reopened.
content.Faculty: Teachers are well qualified. Their teaching methods are good, especially in maths. The coding teacher doesn't know how to teach. The course is regularly updated according to industrial needs. Exams are tough but not very hard to pass.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: I am dissatisfied with the college. One should take admission in a government college.

content.Placements: No single student got placed through college placements, but by off-campus, everyone got placed in reputed companies, like L&T, Punj Lloyd, Unitech, etc. No students got an internship through college, but from their resources, everyone got an internship in companies like L&T, DLF, Punj Lloyd, Soma, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There was no Wi-Fi facility from 2006-2010, but now I don't know. There are good labs, classrooms and also a library in the college. The college hostel is average as per the price they charge. The breakfast provided in the hostel is good, but dinner used to be pathetic. Sometimes I used to eat chapati with sugar to get sleep. There are no medical facilities in the college. There are good sports and games at the college. There is a vast stadium in the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: I had a very bad experience in the college.

content.Placements: There were no placements for my branch. The college doesn't provide placements to the students who don't have proper knowledge about their subjects.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was very bad. Classrooms were in very poor condition and were not maintained properly. Washrooms were not even usable. Wi-Fi facility was available just for namesake. The library was not maintained properly. The canteen was not much good. Drinking water facilities were sometimes not available on the campus, and you have to go to some other place to have water. Overall, the infrastructure of the college was very poor.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Yes its getting success in placement and infrastructure year by year.

content.Placements: I got no placement from college. But in my training of 6 month I got placed in Bangalore in techasoft Pvt. Lmt company. Currently working in Indore in simpalm company. I am a Android developer. And working on live application in my company. From my college I did not get any support but from my faculty I got lots of support they helped what I should do to be successful in my life.
content.Infrastructure: There is separate block for each category students and each block has least 3 or 4. Floors and each floors has around 5 to 7 classrooms. College has lots of open places like park, play ground, parking place, at the break time we used parks for having sun Ray's in winter's and used tree in summer season. There physical time at that time we play different games in playground. Gym also there to trained our students for games. For national level.

overview_faqs.question: Can Matha College of Technology be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Matha College of Technology is a renowned institution offering B.E. / B.Tech, UG Diploma, After 10th Diploma. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. Matha College of Technology boasts an impressive review rating of 2.62 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 2.5 for Campus Life, 2.25 for Placements, 3.17 for Faculty, and 2.42 for Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Matha College of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Not balanced. Less enjoyment more studying .

content.Placements: Math college was recently brought by kuttukaran group which is big automobile company in india. Before that the college placements was not that good (heard from seniors) now the college doing a good job in providing internships and placement for the students which is appreciable.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are avarage. The hostel is pretty bad only got 6 rooms I guess. The kuttukaran group take initiative in bringing new labs for students with the latest specs computer lab and automobile lab with bmw engine to work in and much more. Canteen is good. And they have rooftop turf which is a plus factor .

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Review of Matha College of Technology.

content.Placements: The placements are provided only one time in my three years of engineering career. Even they were provided in BPO companies mainly. I haven't seen any reputed companies visiting here for placements. However, our college is trying to improve its standards and will improve them soon.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in the college are moderate. There is a separate hostel facility for boys and girls, and nutritious food is served in a centrally located mess. Facilities like telephonic access, newspapers, TV, Wi-Fi, access, etc., are available. There are a civil engineering lab, computer lab, electrical lab, electronics lab and mechanical lab.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculty.

content.Placements: In the first semester, there were almost 60 students, but at last, there were only 47 students for the examination, and only 7 students passed out from this college. They offered placements, but companies related to our course did not visit here. Some companies visited here were also fake.
content.Infrastructure: There were very poor lab facilities. Labs are constructed only a few days, i.e.,3 days, before our exams. The Wi-Fi is not available for students. Classrooms are average. The library is good. Canteen foods are some times very poor and not hygienic.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Don't join this college; it is an utter disappointment.

content.Placements: The college provides poor placements, and the placement rate was also low. Barely a few companies came for recruitment, and those were mainly BPOs. If you are looking for better placements, then Matha College is a wrong choice. No special training or sessions are provided to students on how to present oneself in an interview.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides average infrastructure facilities. There are decent classrooms and below average labs. There is Wi-Fi connection in the campus, but it is rarely accessible. The canteen is okay with decent food. Boys hostel is a mere 4 room building, and I heard that the girls' hostel is better and decent.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: My engineering life was almost spoiled in that college.

content.Placements: Not many companies are interested in conducting campus recruitment in our college, except a few which are not famous. If you are looking to be placed through a campus interview in a well-known company, while joining this college, then you would probably be disappointed. Only a few students got campus placements in the previous batch.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides Wi-Fi hotspot facility almost everywhere on the campus. But the connectivity is not available every time. You would probably be connected to a Wi-Fi hotspot without internet connectivity most of the time. The labs and infrastructure are just okay. There is nothing like air-conditioned computer labs with high configured systems. What you have is mostly is old computers with keyboards covered in dust. The classrooms have projectors, but only a few of them works properly. Canteen is just okay but not recommended to have food regularly.

faqs.answer: Kakinada Institute Of Engineering And Technology For Women has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.After 10th DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects. Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply. There is no age restriction.

faq_section.heading: FAQs
faq_section.introduction: The AP EAPCET 2026 registration last date has been extended to Mar 24, 2026, (without a late fee) for Kakinada Institute Of Engineering And Technology For Women admission to the BTech and BPharma courses. The BTech exams are scheduled for May 12 to May 15, and on May 18, 2026, followed by the BPharma exam on May 19 and May 20, 2026.

answer.text: Kakinada Institute Of Engineering And Technology For Women has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have passsed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream and obtained at least 50% marks (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from an AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.After 10th DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects. Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply. There is no age restriction.

faqs.answer: A:    Sir C.V Raman Institute of Technology Sciences offers Degree and Diploma courses including 6 UG and 4 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Sir C.V Raman Institute of Technology Sciences has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Civil Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, M.E./M.Tech specializations in Electronics Engineering, Power Engineering, VLSI Design, Computer Science Engineering.

reviews_list.review_title: I am really satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: The college offers 5 courses, like mechanical, civil, CSE, ECE and EEE. I am from civil engineering. In my department, a total of 180 students are studying. This year, 73% of students got placed. The highest package offered in our department is 8 LPA. The lowest package is 4 LPA. The maximum number of students got placed. Companies offer HR roles as well. 65% of students got internships from our course. We got placements in Megha, and some of the students got placed in L&T.
review_content.Infrastructure: We got good facilities. We have a huge library with thousands of volumes. Wi-Fi is available in every classroom and even in the hostel. The food quality is fantastic, and we have our own water plant with a purification system. Medical facilities are available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: CVRT is simply the best college in our area.

review_content.Placements: The training and placement cell of our college takes care of placements. They provide training classes on aptitude, reasoning and soft skills. Nearly 60 students got placed in different companies like Polaris, Flipkart, GJ Solutions, Hetero, HGS, Kotak, Teleperformance and Vinuthna.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was quite good. Classrooms are very spacious. A library is available for students, and they provide the books at low prices each semester. Wi-Fi facility is available all over the campus. Labs are available with good equipment.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best college that provides good quality food.

review_content.Placements: More than 75% of students got placed in our college. The biggest salary package offered was 10 LPA. The recruiting companies were Infosys, IBM, and HCL.

faqs.question: How can I get into Sir C.V Raman Institute of Technology Sciences for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

rows:
Candidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.

Candidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects.
Candidates belonging to NIOS/APOSS/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject.
Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in April/ May-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared can also apply.
There is no age restriction.

Candidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant stream of engineering and technology and secure the above-mentioned minimum percentage (45% in case of reserved category candidates) from AICTE/UGC approved institution recognised by the Government of Andhra Pradesh as equivalent thereto.
Preference will be given to candidates qualified in GATE in the relevant branch based on their test scores and the remaining seats with the candidates qualified in APPGECET as per their merit ranks.
Final year student can also apply, provided they have completed the prescribed course and passed all the subjects for the award of degree by the concerned
university on or before the date of counselling.

overview_faqs.question: Is Sir C.V Raman Institute of Technology Sciences a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Sir C.V Raman Institute of Technology Sciences is a well-known institution for B.Tech, After 1th Diploma, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Sir C.V Raman Institute of Technology Sciences has a rating of 3 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3 on campuslife, 2.8 on placements, 3.2 on faculty and 2.8 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Sir C.V Raman Institute of Technology Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Join our college and build your future at your will, we have good infrastructure, placements .

content.Placements: Students with percentages above 75 are mostly considered. The highest package is 17 LPA and the least is 4 LPA. IBM, Smartsoc Solutions, Deloitte, and Mphasis are the top recruiting companies for my course. Almost everyone got internships in our course at Deloitte. The top roles offered include Software Developer, Data Analyst, Machine Learning Engineer, and Cybersecurity Analyst.
content.Infrastructure: After all the infrastructure of our college building and hostal is good. We have a good classrooms, a distinct collection of books for academics and general. The quality of the food in our canteen and mess is good, we are encouraged to play games either indoor or outdoor.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: I am really satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: The college offers 5 courses, like mechanical, civil, CSE, ECE and EEE. I am from civil engineering. In my department, a total of 180 students are studying. This year, 73% of students got placed. The highest package offered in our department is 8 LPA. The lowest package is 4 LPA. The maximum number of students got placed. Companies offer HR roles as well. 65% of students got internships from our course. We got placements in Megha, and some of the students got placed in L&T.
content.Infrastructure: We got good facilities. We have a huge library with thousands of volumes. Wi-Fi is available in every classroom and even in the hostel. The food quality is fantastic, and we have our own water plant with a purification system. Medical facilities are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: CVRT is simply the best college in our area.

content.Placements: The training and placement cell of our college takes care of placements. They provide training classes on aptitude, reasoning and soft skills. Nearly 60 students got placed in different companies like Polaris, Flipkart, GJ Solutions, Hetero, HGS, Kotak, Teleperformance and Vinuthna.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was quite good. Classrooms are very spacious. A library is available for students, and they provide the books at low prices each semester. Wi-Fi facility is available all over the campus. Labs are available with good equipment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college that provides good quality food.

content.Placements: More than 75% of students got placed in our college. The biggest salary package offered was 10 LPA. The recruiting companies were Infosys, IBM, and HCL.
content.Infrastructure: The environment of our college was good with beautiful greenery. There were no games to play. The food served was good in quality and taste. Washrooms were not cleaned properly.
content.Faculty: Teachers in our college were the best. They provided good education for students.
content.Other: I chose this course as it provides many job opportunities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied with the placements and hostel facilities.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered is 6 LPA. The average salary package offered is 3 LPA. Around 10 companies visit our college to recruit students.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facilities are average. The quality of the food served in the hostel is average. The canteen is available. The food served in the canteen is good.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are good, well-experienced, and talented. Our college organises industrial visits for students. Semester exams are difficult. The pass percentage of our college is 70%.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Overall, it is a good college on a low budget.

review_content.Placements: Around 25% of students were placed in our course. We are not yet ready for placements, but internships are great as we get many options to choose from.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are good. All classrooms are equipped with LED smartboards. High-speed Wi-Fi is also available, and any books that we want are available in the library. The quality of food is good, but it needs some improvement.
review_content.Faculty: The teaching quality is good. Most of the teachers are young and talented with dedication. As for their dedication, it is our pleasure to have teachers like them. The curriculum makes students industry-ready. The pass percentage is 88 as semester exams are tough.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: Students from our course did not get placed or offered any position so far as we are only in the 2nd year. I am sure they will provide and give us the best suitable job. Our university is still in a growing stage, but this is the best technical university in Manipur.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides the best and the newest updated technology for our labs. The college provides Wi-Fi facility with 300 Mbps speed. Lab rooms are equipped with air-conditioned and fans. We have power classrooms. It provides the best library, and I would say 100% satisfactory. The hostel is the best I have been to. It provides medical facilities with transportation.

review_summary.college_name: Manipur Technical University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it is a good college on a low budget.

content.Placements: Around 25% of students were placed in our course. We are not yet ready for placements, but internships are great as we get many options to choose from.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are good. All classrooms are equipped with LED smartboards. High-speed Wi-Fi is also available, and any books that we want are available in the library. The quality of food is good, but it needs some improvement.
content.Faculty: The teaching quality is good. Most of the teachers are young and talented with dedication. As for their dedication, it is our pleasure to have teachers like them. The curriculum makes students industry-ready. The pass percentage is 88 as semester exams are tough.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Students from our course did not get placed or offered any position so far as we are only in the 2nd year. I am sure they will provide and give us the best suitable job. Our university is still in a growing stage, but this is the best technical university in Manipur.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides the best and the newest updated technology for our labs. The college provides Wi-Fi facility with 300 Mbps speed. Lab rooms are equipped with air-conditioned and fans. We have power classrooms. It provides the best library, and I would say 100% satisfactory. The hostel is the best I have been to. It provides medical facilities with transportation.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the campus. No placements but good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: When I was studying, there was no campus interview in our college. After completion of graduation, I applied for jobs on Linkedln and got a job. Now I am earning 30k salary with my own efforts. 9-10% students get placed and they make everyone to pay money for no reason.
review_content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is okayish. There is no Wi-Fi, no proper lab but a small library is there. I am not a hosteler but I have heard about it. Food was not good. No Wi-Fi was there and no medical facilities. There was no ground for playing games.
